ksa_text: Skill in aligning data and AI program objectives to organizational strategy, translating business priorities into data and AI capability requirements with measurable outcomes.

Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within market research, survey analysis, and consumer insights.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.5284 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.5284 for DG domain provides sufficient cross-framework signal per DAMA DMBOK governance competencies; governance awareness at practitioner level appears in O*NET 15-2051 expanded skill sets. Strong signal across nist_ai_rmf=0.528, eu_ai_act=0.484, ddat=0.460 indicates genuine competency overlap despite absence of direct analytics terminology. External ground truth upholds inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. Score 0.5284 exceeds external evidence threshold for DG domain inclusion in Market Research Analyst.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5284, domain DG, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
